headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Just Passed The Fed Stress Test And Added Record Assets
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) comfortably passed the Federal Reserve's 2026 CCAR stress test, confirming a strong capital position. The company reported record net new assets and brokerage account onboarding, pointing to rising market share. These regulatory and business milestones arrive at a time of closer scrutiny across the brokerage and banking industry. For investors tracking Charles Schwab, the combination of a clean 2026 CCAR result and record client inflows stands out. The stock most...
